session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2. Here's the summary:
## Summary
**Make failed: Prettier check found formatting issues**
## Details
The fast-ci target failed at the Prettier formatting check step. The issues are:
**Files needing formatting (2 files):** 1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
## Passing Checks
All other checks passed successfully: - Linting: All checks passed - Format check (ruff): 1621 files already formatted - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 5450 passed in 20.81s - Unit tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 4.24s - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 112 passed in 0.82s - Unit tests (erkbot): 114 passed in 2.16s
The failure is isolated to the Prettier formatting step for the two markdown files listed above. Run `prettier --write` on these files to fix the formatting issues.
